'''Spang's''' was located on [[Tanquilla Beach/Legends|''Tanquilla Beach'']], near the bottom of the installation. Run by [[Spang]], it occupied the largest repair space on the station. Spang's work was legendary, and the repair shop usually had a long list of ships waiting to be worked on. Spang's also had a portable drydock available to it to work on capital ships in parking orbit. Spang's granddaughter, [[Fia (engineer)|Fia]], also worked in the shop.

The crew of the ''[[FarStar]]'' engaged the services of Fia, and the resources of the repair shop, to fix the damage to their hyperdrive suffered at [[Shintel]].
